questions: Bangladesh er traditional dance ki ki
answers: Dance is a performing art that uses rhythmic body movements to express emotions, tell stories, or simply enjoy music. Styles range from ballet and contemporary to hip-hop and folk dance.
Dance holo music er shathe body movement — emotions express kora, story bolা, ba just enjoy kora. Ballet, hip-hop, salsa, folk dance — onek type ache.

For beginners, try hip-hop, salsa, or contemporary dance. In Bangladesh, traditional dances include Manipuri, Jari, Baul, and various folk dances. YouTube tutorials are a great free way to start learning.

Dancing improves cardiovascular health, flexibility, balance, and coordination. It also reduces stress, boosts mood, and builds confidence. Just 30 minutes of dancing burns significant calories while being fun!
